title: notopleura marginata
intro: Notopleura marginata, also known as Sideroxylon marginatum, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a medicinal plant with various properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial effects, which make it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Notopleura marginata include its ability to treat fever, malaria, and other infectious diseases, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Notopleura marginata can be obtained through decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
